# [LinuxOS] init-latex.el

```default
;;; init-latex.el --- LaTeX / AUCTeX + latexmk (Linux optimized)

(use-package tex
  :ensure auctex
  :defer t

  :hook (LaTeX-mode . my/latex-setup)

  :config
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------
  ;; Core AUCTeX settings
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------

  (setq TeX-auto-save t
        TeX-parse-self t
        TeX-save-query nil
        TeX-PDF-mode t
        TeX-source-correlate-mode t
        TeX-source-correlate-method 'synctex)

  ;; -------------------------------------------------------
  ;; Linux PDF viewer setup (NO macOS Skim)
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------

  ;; Preferred: zathura (lightweight, best SyncTeX support on Linux)
  ;; Fallback: evince (GNOME default)
  (setq TeX-view-program-selection
        '((output-pdf "Zathura")))

  (cond
   ;; Zathura (recommended)
   ((executable-find "zathura")
    (setq TeX-view-program-list
          '(("Zathura"
             ("zathura %o"
              (mode-io-correlate
               "zathura --synctex-forward %n:0:%b %o"))))))

   ;; Evince fallback
   ((executable-find "evince")
    (setq TeX-view-program-list
          '(("Evince" "evince %o")))))

  ;; -------------------------------------------------------
  ;; latexmk integration (modern default on Linux)
  ;; -------------------------------------------------------

  (add-to-list 'TeX-command-list
               '("LatexMk"
                 "latexmk -pdf -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error %s"
                 TeX-run-TeX nil t
                 :help "Run latexmk for PDF output"))

  (setq TeX-command-default "LatexMk"))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; LaTeX mode hook
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(defun my/latex-setup ()
  "My custom LaTeX setup for Linux academic workflow."

  ;; RefTeX for citations & labels
  (turn-on-reftex)
  (setq reftex-plug-into-AUCTeX t)

  ;; Writing support
  (flyspell-mode 1)
  (LaTeX-math-mode 1)
  (visual-line-mode 1)

  ;; Better paragraph filling for academic writing
  (setq fill-column 90)
  (auto-fill-mode 1))

(provide 'init-latex)
;;; init-latex.el ends here
```

### Additional setup

- Zathura

Why it’s perfect for Emacs + AUCTeX:

instant SyncTeX forward/backward search
lightweight
works with latexmk seamlessly

- Install on Ubuntu:

```default
sudo apt install zathura
```
